name: fe
description: The frontend for LLM-based web application development.

scripts.release:alpha: npm version prerelease --preid=alpha && npm publish --tag alpha
scripts.test:browser: node gauntlet/apps/normalized-kanban/e2e.node.js && node gauntlet/apps/data-grid/e2e.node.js && node gauntlet/apps/settings-form/e2e.node.js && node gauntlet/apps/live-dashboard/e2e.node.js && node gauntlet/apps/product-catalog/e2e.node.js
scripts.verify:all: npm run generate && npm run generate:kanban && npm run generate:dashboard && npm run generate:settings && npm run generate:grid && npm run generate:catalog && npm run generate:ops && npm run verify:generated && npm run test:native && npm run test:browser && npm run bench && npm run gauntlet && npm run maturity

author: Edward McConnell
